name: EJB Bad Practices: Use of AWT Swing
description: An Enterprise JavaBean uses AWT/Swing GUI functionality, violating the EJB specification. Server-side beans should not interact with display or keyboard resources, as most servers do not allow direct interaction between application code and attached peripherals.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node within an EJB context that imports or invokes AWT/Swing classes via EXTERNAL calls. Look for GUI framework usage (java.awt.*, javax.swing.*) within enterprise bean code.
